DailyScore.title: Daily Score
DailyScore.description: Represents the discipline score for a class on a specific day.

details.description: Detailed analysis or notes from the scoring.

authorUid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the score.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

WeeklyScore.title: Weekly Score
WeeklyScore.description: Represents the total competition score for a class for a specific week.

weekNumber.description: The week number of the year.

details.description: Breakdown of the weekly score components.

authorUid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the score.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.
